parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "store_id": null,
  "status": "error",
  "error_message": "{{ $json.message || 'Error desconocido en scraping' }}",
  "error_details": {{ JSON.stringify($json) }},
  "scraped_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}
